---
title: "Splide Image Carousel Example"
format:
    html:
        output-file: index.html
        height: 800 # default height and width ensure consistent behaviour on different screens
        width: 1250
filters:
    - splide-carousel
---

## Simple Carousel Example

Here is a carousel with three images.

:::{.splide-carousel}
![](example_assets/1_intro_or_ds_python.jpeg)
![](example_assets/2_des.jpeg)
![](example_assets/3_geographic.jpeg)
:::
